  • 24 states have passed age verification laws that are either already in effect or take effect this month. As savvy internet users, most of us know that such measures are pointless considering the existence of VPN's etc, but we still have to comply with legal requirements. Starting this week we are going to have to block half the US from our sites, so make whatever preparations you consider necessary. For more info, see https://action.freespeechcoalition.com/age-verification-resources/state-avs-laws/

HWMILF

Registered User
  • Today at 8:42 PM

If you are serious about this, you should probably go to Germany, where the Breeding fetish is enormous. But be prepared for something that is very far from the "porn" version most young breeders think they are signing up for. What most breeding couples want is the sometimes year-long preparation, meeting with the breeder, talking about it, planning, etc. This is the main erotic phase for the couple, followed by the (usually) two-week breeding phase when the baby is made, followed by the pregnancy, which is the ecstasy phase. After that, everything changes into a very normal ****** situation for the couple. They have to take care of the child.
